chapter goal: Where do case distinctions and complex numbers enter when conics become computational objects?
computational checks: cross-ratio invariance under a projective reparametrization
join/meet incidence for generated homogeneous points
mode-specific conic or hyperbolic numeric check when relevant
gaps: Proof-heavy material in Chapter 11 is represented by conic diagrams, determinant/cross-ratio checks, or small parameter experiments rather than copied text.
